channel.title: GitHub Starlark Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Starlark in GitHub

item.title: openconfig/gnoi
item.description: gRPC Network Operations Interface (gNOI) defines a set of gRPC-based microservices for executing operational commands on network devices.

item.title: googleapis/api-common-protos
item.description: A standard library for use in specifying protocol buffer APIs.

item.title: bazelbuild/rules_pkg
item.description: Bazel rules for creating packages of many types (zip, tar, deb, rpm, ...)

item.title: rules-proto-grpc/rules_proto_grpc
item.description: Bazel rules for building Protobuf and gRPC code and libraries from proto_library targets

item.title: aspect-build/toolchains_protoc
item.description: EXPERIMENTAL: Pre-built protoc binary toolchain for Bazel, fetched from official protobuf releases

item.title: GoogleContainerTools/distroless
item.description: 🥑 Language focused docker images, minus the operating system.

item.title: bazelbuild/bazel-skylib
item.description: Common useful functions and rules for Bazel

item.title: aspect-build/rules_js
item.description: High-performance Bazel rules for running Node.js tools and building JavaScript projects

item.title: jvolkman/rules_pycross
item.description: Bazel + Python rules for cross-platform external dependencies

item.title: bazel-contrib/rules_cuda
item.description: Starlark implementation of bazel rules for CUDA.

item.title: keith/buildifier-prebuilt
item.description: A bazel toolchain for using prebuilt binaries for buildifier and buildozer
